subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! I have read thy letter, uttered thy name, and beseeched God [3.5s]... ...You have asked why these people have died, despite reciting supplications and reading prayers of healing for them.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه را خواندم و نام ترا بر زبان راندم و از خدا خواستم که
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for healing
